question: How many times did I bake something in the past two weeks?

retrieval_results.context:
User used the oven's convection setting for the first time last Thursday to bake a batch of cookies
User baked a chocolate cake for their sister's birthday last weekend, enhanced with espresso powder.
User has been experimenting with different types of flour recently
User has been eating many sweet treats lately, including leftover birthday cake
User made a whole wheat baguette last Saturday using whole wheat flour
User plans to bake rustic Italian bread this weekend
User will bake garlic and herb whole wheat focaccia this weekend
User plans to try a whole wheat bread recipe this weekend.
User is planning to bake chicken wings for tonight's dinner
User attempted to bake Italian bread using a sourdough starter on Tuesday, but the dough rose poorly and the loaf was dense and heavy.
